programme.title: 🌊 2.6m @ 12s ONSHORE
programme.desc:

🌊 Swell: 1.8m @ 12s 💨 Wind: 34.0km/h SW (ONSHORE) 💨 Gusts: 54.0km/h 🌊 Wind waves: 1.1m
📋 Onshore wind making it messy • Significant wind chop
